privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real US Supreme Court case data: Obergefell v. Hodges (576 U.S. 644, 2015) and Tinker v. Des Moines Independent Community School District (393 U.S. 503, 1969). The collection 'Brief Research' is initialized with 10 real legal references and the task removes 2 items to reach a target count of 8. DISCREPANCY: Metadata lists the second case as 'Tinker v. Des Moines' but the actual database contains the full official case name 'Tinker v. Des Moines Independent Community School District' (field ID 58 stores the complete case name).
